productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Visi Pro Grey Sports Shoes
description: An absolutely low profile running shoe, the Air Visi Pro II is engineered with lightweight technology to offer a cushioned and comfortable ride. Pair this jeans and tees to don that casually stylish look when not on the run.UpperLightweight nubuck and synthetic leather upper with perforations for maximum breathability, comfort and styleLace-up system for a snug, customised FitMeshed and cushioned tongue for maximum comfort nike swoosh on lateral ankle for support and style Padded and meshed sockliner for comfortable in-step TPU midfoot saddle for lightweight support and comfortMidsolePlush phylon midsole for superior underfoot cushioning, offering a smooth ride Cushioned footbed for shock absorption and impact protectionOutsoleMade of durable carbon rubber to provide ample durability in high wear areas and protection from shock Waffle and herringbone pattern on the outsole to provide greater grip and traction Pivot point on big toe mound for easy turning of the footnike Air technology to provide ample cuhsioning by evenly spreading out shock across the forefoot, enhancing propulsion Impact guidance system along the centre of the foot length for better traction and propulsion Forefoot outsole embedded onto upper as a toe guard to enhance durability and protect the toesWash careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
